app_description: Immersive music player combining weather radio, lyric stage, particle visuals, and 3D playlist shelf.
upload_tip_body: Upload songs here, or set a custom cover for the current track.
home_my_playlists_sub: Open the playlist library on the left
home_daily_sub: Sync your daily songs after login
home_private_radio_sub: Play from your recommendations and playlists
home_profile_sub: Generate preferences after a few plays
visual_console_sub: MINERADIO VISUALS · Auto-hides when mouse moves away
cover_pick_hint: Click anywhere on the album cover to pick a color, or use the recommended colors below.
queue_sub: QUEUE · Auto-hides when mouse moves away
login_hint_pl: Login to see NetEase / QQ playlists
gesture_started: Gesture enabled: Push · Pinch rotate · Fist clench
gesture_hint_all: Push particles / Pinch rotate / Fist clench
gesture_default_hint: Push particles / Pinch rotate / Fist clench
gesture_legend: Push particles · Pinch rotate · Fist clench
toast_diy_tip: Enable DIY player mode to open visual console
guide_step_search_title: Search sources and import entry expand
guide_step_search_body: Top search supports more source switching. Upload songs, covers, and other entries will also appear in DIY mode.
guide_step_library_title: Complete playlists and queue on the left
guide_step_library_body: Approach the left edge to open the playlist/queue panel. Manage queues, personal playlists, and podcasts here.
guide_step_visual_body: Approach the bottom-right or click the visual button to adjust particles, lyrics, lens, 3D shelf, and more visual parameters.
guide_step_controls_body: Sound quality, play order, favorites, lyric source, and more buttons will be fully displayed in DIY mode.
guide_step_shelf_body: The 3D playlist shelf on the right will appear semi-transparent when approached. Click cards to open playlists, or click the play button inside cards to play the entire playlist.
guide_hint_finish: Click blank area to finish guide
server_hash_fail: File verification failed, possibly due to mirror cache issue. Installer blocked.
server_size_mismatch: Download file size mismatch, possibly due to network interruption or incomplete mirror cache.
server_timeout: Connection timeout, network to update mirror is unstable.
server_dns_fail: Domain resolution failed, possibly cannot connect to update mirror.
server_network_interrupted: Network connection interrupted, attempted to switch update mirror.
server_http_403: Update mirror returned 403, possibly rate-limited or blocked.
server_http_404: Update file not found, release resources may not have synced yet.
server_http_5xx: Update mirror server error, please try again later.
server_update_fallback: New version found, backup update mirror enabled.
server_update_fallback_notes: Update check switched to backup mirror
server_download_fallback_notes: Download will automatically use accelerated mirror
server_download_fail_notes: Download failure will show specific reason and current speed
server_downloading_full_waiting: Downloading full installer, waiting for server to provide size
server_downloading_full_no_size: Downloading full installer, server did not provide total size
server_patch_applied: Quick patch applied, takes effect after restart
server_patch_fallback: Quick patch failed, use full installer instead
server_netease_need_login: NetEase requires login to try getting full playback URL
server_netease_trial_only: NetEase only returned trial clip, full playback requires membership or purchase
server_netease_vip_required: NetEase song requires VIP, unable to get full playback URL
server_netease_paid_required: NetEase song requires single/album purchase or higher permission
server_netease_copyright: NetEase copyright unavailable, try switching source or retry later
server_netease_url_unavailable: NetEase did not return playable URL, possibly due to copyright, membership, or regional restrictions
server_qq_need_login: QQ Music requires login or authorization to get playback URL
server_qq_need_auth: QQ Music only has web login state, missing playback authorization. Please reopen official QQ Music login window to complete authorization
server_qq_copyright: QQ Music did not return playback URL for current version, usually due to copyright, membership, or official version restrictions. Try another search result or switch to NetEase
server_qq_paid_required: QQ Music song requires membership, purchase, or digital album permission
server_qq_copyright_fallback: QQ Music copyright unavailable or only playable on official client
server_qq_url_unavailable: QQ Music did not return playback URL, possibly restricted by copyright, membership, or official client
radio_clear_tagline: Brighten the rhythm, like light by the window
radio_storm_tagline: Heavier lows, perfect for turning the world down
radio_rain_tagline: Leave a little damp space for the melody
radio_snow_tagline: Clean, slow, with a touch of winter grain
radio_humid_tagline: Lower the density, leave a little room to breathe
radio_cloudy_tagline: Even diffused light, perfect for keeping the world outside the glass
radio_night_tagline: Late-night frequencies are quieter, perfect for solitude
radio_morning_tagline: The rain hasn't stopped, but the rhythm wakes up first
radio_dusk_tagline: The most gentle thirty minutes before sunset
radio_dusk_rain_tagline: Dusk plus rain, double the emotion
radio_morning_rain_tagline: The rain hasn't stopped, but the rhythm wakes up first
radio_temp_tagline: Weather isn't back yet, playing a safe mix for now
weather_fallback_hint: Weather isn't back yet, try today's recommendations.
desktop_hotkey_conflict: This shortcut is already in use or reserved by the system
queue_empty: Queue is empty, search or open a playlist
patch_applied_restart: Quick patch applied, takes effect after restart.
cached_installer_reused: Reusing previously verified installer, no re-download needed.
installer_ready: Installer ready, click button to open and install.
patch_priority_hint: Prioritizes lightweight patches, updating only missing or changed resources; falls back to full installer when not applicable.
full_installer_fallback: Full installer will be downloaded when no quick patch is available.
click_scan_qq: Click QR Login to open QQ Music official window
click_web_netease: Click Web Login to open NetEase official window
web_login_unsupported: Web login not supported, trying QR code…
opened_netease_window: NetEase window opened, scan QR code…
qq_scan_desc: Open QQ Music official web login window to scan, account session will sync automatically.
netease_web_scan_desc: Open NetEase Music official web login window to scan, avoids QR code rate limiting; account session will sync automatically.
netease_app_scan_desc: Scan with NetEase Music app to sync playlists, likes, and podcasts.
glow_set_independent: Click to set glow color independently
glow_follow_highlight_hint: Click to make glow follow highlight
login_intro_title: A music player and visual stage
login_intro_body: Search or import a song to play. Login syncs playlists, liked songs, and podcasts, bringing covers, lyrics, and particles to life.
login_scan_netease: Scan QR to login NetEase Music
login_scan_netease_desc: Scan with NetEase Music App to sync playlists, liked songs, and podcasts.
login_qq_preview_hint: QQ Music login not yet available, previewing dual-platform interaction.
quality_login_netease_svip: Login to NetEase SVIP to use Studio Master
home_loggedout_hint: After login, your playlists, top artists, and recent plays will appear here. You can also search or import local music.
qq_like_pending: QQ Music like sync pending login integration
local_like_unsupported: Local files do not support like sync
qq_collect_pending: QQ Music collect to playlist pending login integration
local_collect_unsupported: Local files cannot be added to NetEase playlists
not_loggedin_trial: Not logged in · Trial clips only
qq_login_may_expired: QQ Music login may have expired
auto_web_login_unsupported: Auto web login not supported in this environment. Use manual import.
qq_window_opened_scan: QQ Music window opened, scan QR to login…
login_qr_confirmed_no_credential: QR code confirmed but no login credential received, please refresh QR code and try again
account_switch_hint: Switch the platform shown in the top-right; "I want both" will display two login states side by side.
account_switch_dual: Top-right switched to dual-platform side-by-side display.
guide_step4_title: Login only syncs your music library
guide_step4_body: Login syncs playlists, liked songs, and podcasts. You can still search and play without logging in — no forced lock-in.
region_unsupported_hint: Online search is currently only available in China. Local music only for now. Stay tuned for updates!
